dashboard.orphanGameHint: "{title}" is not linked to a creator account yet (common with legacy uploads). Saving will automatically link it to your account.
dashboard.tipsFeeDisclosureIntro: All fees apply per individual tip, not as a lump sum on monthly totals. This is a preview — no real charges yet.
dashboard.tipsFeePerTransactionDesc: Each tip is a separate transaction. Payment processor fees apply per tip. Platform fee is currently 0%.
dashboard.tipsFeePlatformDesc: NexusPlay plans to charge {percent}% per tip to run servers and develop features. Rate may change before launch.
dashboard.tipsFeePaymentDesc: Charged by Stripe/PayPal, typically ~{percent}% + ${fixed} USD, separate from the platform fee.
dashboard.tipsFeeCreatorNetFormula: Net ≈ tip amount − platform fee − payment fee
dashboard.tipsFeeItchCompareDesc: itch.io uses Open Revenue Sharing (creators choose 0–100%, default 10%); payment fees are separate. NexusPlay is 0% during early access; a future site-wide rate (reference {futurePercent}%) would be announced in advance. Games locked at 0% stay at 0%.
dashboard.tipsFeePlayerBriefDesc: Tips are voluntary — games remain fully playable without paying. The exact amount is shown before checkout. Tips support creators; they are not product purchases.
dashboard.tipsFeeSettlementDesc: Tips accumulate in your creator balance and are paid out in batches once a threshold is met (schedule announced at launch).
dashboard.revenueLiveDataNote: Real tip records below show net revenue after payment processor fees. Platform fee is currently 0%.
dashboard.revenuePreviewTipsNote: {count} tip(s) are preview-mode (Stripe not live) and have not settled.
dashboard.revenueMockDataNote: Charts below are simulated preview data, not real payouts. Platform fee is currently 0%; after launch you'll see net revenue after payment processor fees.
dashboard.tipsFeePlatformDescZero: To support early creators, NexusPlay currently charges no platform fee. When you first enable tips, 0% is locked for that game. Future site-wide increases won't affect games already locked at 0%.
dashboard.tipsFeeChangePolicyTitle: If we change the platform fee later
dashboard.tipsFeeChangePolicyDesc: We may adjust the site-wide fee (reference: {futurePercent}%). Changes will be announced at least {days} days in advance and apply only to new transactions after the effective date — never retroactively to settled or withdrawn tips.
dashboard.tipsFeeGrandfatherDesc: Games that enable tips before payments launch lock in 0% permanently. Creators who join after a future increase use the then-current site-wide rate.
dashboard.tipsFeeCreatorNetFormulaZero: Net ≈ tip amount − payment fee (no platform fee currently)
dashboard.platformFeeLockedTitle: Platform fee locked for this game
dashboard.platformFeeLockedDesc: Locked when tips were first enabled. Future site-wide changes won't affect this game.
dashboard.deleteGameDesc: You are about to permanently delete "{title}".
dashboard.deleteGameWarning: ⚠️ This cannot be undone. Game files, cover, forum posts, and stats will all be removed.
dashboard.revenueSectionDesc: Track tip count, average amount, conversion rate, and per-game breakdown.
dashboard.revenueChartDesc: Tip count and revenue over the past 14 days
dashboard.revenueBreakdownDesc: Full breakdown sorted by tip revenue
dashboard.revenueEmptyDesc: This game has not enabled pay-what-you-want tips. Enable them in edit to see revenue here.
dashboard.analyticsLiveDataNote: Real traffic and play data below (last 30 days). Some cards use proxy metrics: likes = unique visitors, play time = unique players.
dashboard.welcomeDescLive: Track performance, analyze trends, and manage your games. Data below comes from real analytics_events.
dashboard.welcomeDescGameLive: Real traffic and play data for this game.
dashboard.partnerAccessDesc: Generate links so media and streamers can play draft builds before public launch.
dashboard.publishMonetizationDesc: Optionally enable tips and set a suggested amount.
dashboard.publishStatusSectionDesc: Choose draft or public before saving.
dashboard.publishStatusDraftDesc: Only you can see it — ideal for private testing.
dashboard.publishStatusPublicDesc: Visible to all players on the homepage.
dashboard.tipsEnabledDesc: Players choose whether and how much to tip.
dashboard.suggestedTipAmountHint: Minimum $1 USD — for reference only; players decide the actual amount.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticeDesc: Players sign in on NexusPlay with Google or Email. Your game does not need its own OAuth or account system.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint1: Login happens on the outer game page (not inside the iframe), so Google sign-in works reliably.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint2: The NexusPlay SDK is auto-injected in the iframe for player identity and cloud saves.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint3: For saves, call NexusPlay.loadSave() / saveSave() in your game — do not wire third-party OAuth yourself.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint4: Guests can play without login; use loadSaveMerged() after sign-in to merge local and cloud progress.
dashboard.platformAuthNoticePoint5: Legacy players: create import codes on the edit page; call importLegacySave(code) in your game.
dashboard.legacyImportDesc: Create one-time codes for players coming from another site or old login. After signing in on NexusPlay, they redeem the code in your game to import progress.
dashboard.legacyImportCreatedTitle: Share these codes with players (shown once)
dashboard.publishStatusNote: Drafts are creator-only previews. Switch to Public to appear on the homepage.
dashboard.alertSuggestedTip: Please enter a suggested tip amount
dashboard.screenshotGalleryHint: Up to 8 images to showcase gameplay (PNG / JPG / WebP)
dashboard.devlogPublishHint: When publishing a new version, add a devlog entry with optional images

rules.title: コミュニティルール
rules.metaTitle: コミュニティルール · NexusPlay
rules.metaDesc: NexusPlay コミュニティフォーラムの利用規範、モデレーターの責務、通報フロー
rules.intro: これらのルールは、ゲームフォーラム、記事のコメント、レビューなど、NexusPlay 上のすべてのコミュニティ関連スペースに適用されます。各ゲームフォーラムのモデレーターは追加ルールを設定する場合があります。ルール違反はコンテンツの削除につながる可能性があり、重大または繰り返しの違反者はアカウント停止または永久BANとなります。
rules.footnote: これはコミュニティのニーズに応じて継続的に更新される動的な文書です。重大な変更はプラットフォームのお知らせまたはこのページで公開されます。
rules.disclaimerP1: NexusPlay はユーザーが投稿したコンテンツ、またはコミュニティメンバーとモデレーターの行動について責任を負いません。安全で前向きなゲームコミュニティの維持に努めています。不適切なコンテンツを見つけた場合は、通報するかお問い合わせください。
rules.disclaimerP2: プラットフォームは、コミュニティの健全性を維持するため、これらのルールをいつでも更新、解釈、執行する権利を留保します。
rules.rule1Title: 罵倒、挑発、スパム、その他の秩序を乱す行為の禁止
rules.rule1Body: 通常のディスカッションを妨げる行為は許可されません。単語や無意味なコンテンツの繰り返し投稿、過度な大文字使用、荒らし、過剰なリンクの投稿などが該当します。違反コンテンツは削除され、アカウントが停止される場合があります。
rules.rule2Title: 論争を引き起こす可能性のあるセンシティブな話題のコンテンツを投稿しないでください
rules.rule2Body: 言論の自由を尊重しますが、他者への配慮もお願いします。宗教、人種、性別、政治、その他のグループに関する極端な立場をフォーラムに投稿して不必要な対立を引き起こさないでください。
rules.rule3Title: 相手が会員かどうかにかかわらず、あらゆる形態のハラスメントは容認されません
rules.rule3Body: 扇動的な発言、脅迫、侮辱、個人への攻撃が含まれます。他人の実名、メール、写真、電話番号、住所などの識別可能な個人情報（いわゆる doxxing）の公開は厳禁です。
rules.rule4Title: ユーザー、モデレーター、管理者になりすまさないでください
rules.rule4Body: 質問への回答を手伝うことはできますが、「公式」権限を主張したり、虚偽のお知らせを広めたり、他のプレイヤーを誤解させる行為は禁止されています。
rules.rule5Title: 未承諾または大量の広告・宣伝メッセージを投稿しないでください
rules.rule5Body: フォーラムは自己宣伝の場ではありません（明示的に許可されたスペースを除く）。トピックに関連した実質的な共有が明らかな広告より優先されます。過度な自己宣伝は停止につながる可能性があります。
rules.rule6Title: プラットフォームの利用規約に違反しないでください
rules.rule6Body: 違法コンテンツ、マルウェアリンク、無許可の他人の作品、ポルノまたは過度に暴力的なコンテンツ、プレイヤーやプラットフォームの安全を損なう可能性のある行為などが含まれますが、これらに限定されません。
rules.moderatorsTitle: コミュニティモデレーター
rules.moderatorsP1: 「コミュニティモデレーター」とは、NexusPlay チーム、または特定のフォーラムのコンテンツ管理を許可されたユーザーです。ゲームクリエイターは自身のゲームフォーラルの主要管理責任を負い、プラットフォームルールに沿った追加規範を設定できます。
rules.moderatorsP2: すべてのモデレーターは一般会員と同じルールが適用されます。モデレーターが権限を乱用していると思われる場合は、通報または連絡窓口からお知らせください。
rules.moderatorsP3: モデレーターはフォーラムの秩序維持の責任があり、ルールの範囲内で適切と判断する処置（例：投稿削除、警告、プラットフォームへの介入依頼）を取ることができます。
rules.moderatorsP4: モデレーターの決定に同意できない場合は、まず丁寧に個人的にコミュニケーションを取ってください。解決しない場合は NexusPlay チームに申し立ててください。
rules.reportingP1: フォーラムで不快に感じるコンテンツを見つけた場合は、記事やコメント横の「通報」機能を使用してください。モデレーターとプラットフォームチームができるだけ早く審査します。
rules.reportingP2: 緊急の状況や安全上の懸念がある場合は、可能な限りリンク、スクリーンショット、発生時刻を添えて NexusPlay チームに直接連絡してください。
rules.reportingP3: フォーラムのモデレーターとして違反コンテンツを発見した場合、関連する記事やコメントを削除できます。必要に応じてプラットフォームにユーザーのBANを依頼してください。

void-gacha.badge: プラットフォーム旗艦
void-gacha.description: 虚空の深淵へ踏み入り、神秘の仮想カードで運命を紡ぐ。ネオンと虚無が交わるガチャ宇宙で、レアカードを集め、コアデッキを構築し、終わりなき深淵に挑め。

core-defense.description: 重工業採掘帝国を築き、鋼鉄の防衛線を張れ！精密コンベアと完全自動化工場のサプライチェーンで、終わりなきエイリアン機械の波を退け。コア臨界が燃え上がる時、鋼鉄と自動砲塔だけが尊厳を守る。

cyber-fortune.badge: サイバーギャンブル旗艦
cyber-fortune.description: 未来のビッグデータ統計とギャンブル戦略が融合した頭脳戦。ネオンに彩られたサイバー夜の街で、独自の012マトリックスとフルコース対戦戦略で相手の次の一手を読め。確率の世界で、王はあなただけ。

legal.metaDesc: NexusPlay Terms of Service, Payments & Tips Policy, and Disclaimer
legal.title: Legal & Policies
legal.intro: By using NexusPlay you acknowledge these policies. We aim to operate transparently so creators and players can participate with confidence.
legal.draftNotice: This page summarizes platform policies. No real charges occur until payments launch. Site-wide platform fee is currently 0% (early creator promotion).
legal.footerNote: This page is not legal advice. Consult a qualified attorney if you have questions.
legal.termsP1: NexusPlay provides web game publishing, play, and community features. You must meet the minimum age in your jurisdiction, or have guardian consent, to use paid or tipping features.
legal.termsP2: Creators are responsible for uploaded games, descriptions, and assets, including accurate AI disclosure. Illegal, infringing, malicious, or misleading content is prohibited.
legal.termsP3: We may review, unpublish, or remove content that violates community rules or law, and suspend or terminate accounts.
legal.termsP4: We may update these terms; continued use constitutes acceptance of the revised version.
legal.paymentsP1: NexusPlay tips are voluntary support, not a purchase of games or digital goods. Games remain fully playable without tipping.
legal.paymentsP2: Site-wide platform fee is currently {percent}% (early creator promotion). When you first enable tips, that rate locks for your game. If the site-wide rate later increases (reference: {futurePercent}%), games already locked at 0% are unaffected.
legal.paymentsP3: Payment processor fees (Stripe/PayPal, typically ~{percent}% + ${fixed} USD per tip) are separate from the platform fee.
legal.paymentsP4: Estimated creator net ≈ tip − platform fee (currently 0%) − processor fee. Funds are processed through the platform and accumulate until batch payout.
legal.paymentsP5: Tips are generally non-refundable support payments; any refund policy after launch will be posted here.
legal.paymentsP6: Payments are not live yet — enabling tips does not create real transactions today.
legal.disclaimerP1: NexusPlay is not fully liable for user-uploaded games, creator statements, or interactions between users. Games are provided by creators; we provide hosting and discovery.
legal.disclaimerP2: The service is provided "as is" without guarantees of uninterrupted or error-free operation. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for losses from network issues, third-party services, or force majeure.
legal.disclaimerP3: Tax reporting and compliance with local laws (consumer protection, AML, etc.) are the responsibility of creators and payers; seek professional advice when needed.
legal.paymentsP7: We may adjust the site-wide platform fee. Any change will be announced at least {days} days in advance and applies only to new transactions after the effective date — never retroactively to settled or withdrawn amounts.
legal.privacyP1: NexusPlay collects account data (email, display name), uploaded game content, play and analytics events, and tip/payout records to operate the platform.
legal.privacyP2: Billing addresses are used for receipts and compliance; payment card data is processed by Stripe and full card numbers are not stored on our servers.
legal.privacyP3: You can export personal data or delete your account under Data & account. Exports include tip receipts and transaction history.
legal.privacyP4: We may use cookies and analytics to improve the service; if Google Analytics is enabled, you can limit tracking in your browser settings.
